final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: cinematic concept art, panoramic landscape
Primary request: panoramic view of a Mars colony in the year 2387
Scene/backdrop: vast red Martian desert surface, Olympus Mons visible in the far distance, orange-red Martian sky
Subject: massive transparent dome city clusters standing on red desert, lush vegetation and high-rise buildings visible inside domes, giant solar collection arrays and atmosphere terraforming devices operating outside domes, team of explorers in advanced spacesuits conducting geological survey in foreground, multiple six-wheeled Mars rovers parked nearby
Style/medium: hard sci-fi aesthetic, photorealistic CGI rendering, cinematic concept art
Composition/framing: wide panoramic shot, epic scale, establishing shot
Lighting/mood: realistic Martian sunlight simulation, dramatic atmospheric lighting, majestic and futuristic
Color palette: ochre red, orange-yellow, silver-gray as dominant tones
Materials/textures: transparent dome glass with structural frames, metallic solar panels, rugged Martian regolith, advanced spacesuit materials
Constraints: maintain hard sci-fi realism, accurate Mars lighting conditions, preserve epic scale and futuristic atmosphere
Avoid: cartoonish styling, Earth-like blue sky, fantasy elements, low-poly rendering, oversaturated colors
